scripts.setup: python3.13 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements-dev.txt && PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm ci --prefix frontend
scripts.test: . .venv/bin/activate && pytest && PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run build --prefix frontend
